tasks.subject: Task 1: One context per PR (backend + frontend)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Switch PR contexts from per-(PR, subproject) to per-PR across the backend routes/queries and the frontend derivations, so a common-only PR is selectable and shows its packages.

**Files:**
- Modify: backend/internal/store/packages.go
- Modify: backend/internal/store/events.go
- Modify: backend/internal/store/packages_test.go
- Modify: backend/internal/store/events_test.go
- Modify: backend/internal/api/handlers.go
- Modify: backend/internal/api/server.go
- Modify: frontend/src/App.vue

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- three PR store funcs match whole-PR prefix, no subproject/version params or common union
- store tests: pr-104 covers all subprojects incl other+common and excludes other PRs; common-only pr-200 returns its packages
- PR routes /api/pr/{pr}/{version}/{packages,events,repos}, handlers resolve only pr
- contexts+artifactsContexts emit one context per PR (label PR #N, prefix isv:percona:PR:pr-N, apiBase /api/pr/pr-N), common skip removed
- go test, go build, npm run build all pass

**Verify:** cd backend && go test ./internal/... && go build ./... && cd ../frontend && npm run build

